message:
🌱 Add k8up: Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups mission (#948)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "k8up-319-integrated-support-for-rwo-pvcs-file-backups",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "k8up: Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups",
+    "description": "Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current k8up deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your k8up version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nhelm list -n k8up 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working k8up installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review k8up configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant k8up configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nkubectl get configmap -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=k8up\n```\n**As** user of K8up\n**I want** to backup PVCs with RWO access mode\n**So that** my precious files stored in RWO volumes are backed up as well."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups",
+        "description": "```\nGiven a PVC with RWO access mode in Bound phase\nAnd no application Pod has mounted that PVC\nAnd the linked PV has a NodeAffinity rule defined\nWhen a backup runs\nThen the backup Pod runs on the same node as configured via NodeAffinity spec.\nAnd the files are backed up.\n```\n\nif the specified node\n```yaml\n2. Cluster admin labels a PVC `k8up.io/backup-volume: \"enabled\"`:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up\nkubectl get events -n k8up --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "```\nGiven a PVC with RWO access mode in Bound phase\nAnd no application Pod has mounted that PVC\nAnd the linked PV has a NodeAffinity rule defined\nWhen a backup runs\nThen the backup Pod runs on the same node as configured via NodeAffinity spec.\nAnd the files are backed up.\n```\n\nif the specified node has taints defined we'd need to fetch the node in order to retrieve the necessary tolerations.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2. Cluster admin labels a PVC `k8up.io/backup-volume: \"enabled\"`:",
+        "Apply PV/PVC:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "k8up",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "k8up"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Job",
+      "Node"
+    ],

+    ],
